ogTitle: Evans Landing vs Evanslea: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Evans Landing and Evanslea.
heading: Evans Landing vs Evanslea — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Evans Landing, Queensland and Evanslea, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Evanslea has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Evans Landing (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Evans Landing or Evanslea safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Evans Landing has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Evanslea scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Evans Landing scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Evanslea scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Evans Landing or Evanslea?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Evanslea has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
